A third of the clients.

And the far away parts can be and usually are related.

In other words, if we don't have like a pretty solid time to delivery or within good striking distance, it is probably true that the pipelines are not in great shape or that they are not delivering something that the client expects.
So, of course, like the ME has to do a lot more work to get them where they need to go.

And then if you cascade from there, it is very likely that the client is not getting the best quality content we can produce because the ME is spending a ton of time doing sort of like big architecture.

They're not spending the time on the things that actually are going to make it performant, like, you know, SEO specifics, you know, clear narrative structure, and just making their own, you know, gut instinctual editorial changes to those things that they know tactically will support the strategy that we have proposed to the client, right?
So, like, that's, it's a cascading series of effects.
The efficiencies don't, you can't, can't be absorbed at the human layer infinitely.
There is just a finite amount of stuff that you can figure out, right?

So, like, the mission going forward, obviously, is to get everybody in the good bucket, but in the very near term, there's going to be some hyper-focus on those of you that have long time to delivery, because that is, as I mentioned before, part of the picture.
and I don't, and the reason I'm...

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review production performance and introduce new support structures.](https://fathom.video/share/CYfYSpExYZpVCd44gg8_zQxzcHorVXQF?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - **Performance Gap:** Only \~30% of clients meet the target of high-quality content, client satisfaction, and \<30 min/deliverable time-to-delivery (TTD).
  - [**TTD as a Red Flag:** High TTD (avg. is 1h 4m) signals a cascading failure: inefficient pipelines force MEs to do architectural work, leaving no time for performance-enhancing edits.](https://fathom.video/share/CYfYSpExYZpVCd44gg8_zQxzcHorVXQF?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [**New Team Leads:** Jen and Sydney will provide direct ME support, focusing on troubleshooting high-TTD accounts and improving pipeline architecture.](https://fathom.video/share/CYfYSpExYZpVCd44gg8_zQxzcHorVXQF?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
  - [**Pipeline Hygiene is Critical:** The top causes of high TTD are artifact conflicts and instructions lacking context. Use the Convergence Report and provide concrete examples (e.g., a client-approved CTA) to fix this.](https://fathom.video/share/CYfYSpExYZpVCd44gg8_zQxzcHorVXQF?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)

## Topics

### Production Performance "Vibe Check"

  - [Performance is categorized into three tiers:](https://fathom.video/share/CYfYSpExYZpVCd44gg8_zQxzcHorVXQF?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
      - [**30% "Good":** Meets all targets (quality, satisfaction, TTD).](https://fathom.video/share/CYfYSpExYZpVCd44gg8_zQxzcHorVXQF?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
      - [**30% "Striking Distance":** Close on some metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/CYfYSpExYZpVCd44gg8_zQxzcHorVXQF?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
      - [**30% "Far Away":** Significantly misses targets.](https://fathom.video/share/CYfYSpExYZpVCd44gg8_zQxzcHorVXQF?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [The goal is to move all clients into the "Good" bucket.](https://fathom.video/share/CYfYSpExYZpVCd44gg8_zQxzcHorVXQF?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)

### The TTD Problem: A Cascading Failure

  - [High TTD is the primary indicator of account issues, as it reveals a cascading failure:](https://fathom.video/share/CYfYSpExYZpVCd44gg8_zQxzcHorVXQF?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
    1.  [**Inefficient Pipelines:** Force MEs to do architectural work.](https://fathom.video/share/CYfYSpExYZpVCd44gg8_zQxzcHorVXQF?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
    2.  [**No Time for Quality:** Leaves no time for performance-enhancing edits (SEO, narrative).](https://fathom.video/share/CYfYSpExYZpVCd44gg8_zQxzcHorVXQF?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
    3.  [**Client Dissatisfaction:** Results from lower-quality content.](https://fathom.video/share/CYfYSpExYZpVCd44gg8_zQxzcHorVXQF?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [**Average TTD:** 1 hour, 4 minutes.](https://fathom.video/share/CYfYSpExYZpVCd44gg8_zQxzcHorVXQF?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
      - [This figure is skewed by outliers; removing the top 5 accounts drops the average significantly.](https://fathom.video/share/CYfYSpExYZpVCd44gg8_zQxzcHorVXQF?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
  - [**High-TTD Accounts:** Relay, Diligent, Fieldguide, Rimkus, Cresta, Navon.](https://fathom.video/share/CYfYSpExYZpVCd44gg8_zQxzcHorVXQF?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [**Proactive Action Required:** MEs with TTD \>2x the average must file tickets (ENG, Editorial) immediately to get support.](https://fathom.video/share/CYfYSpExYZpVCd44gg8_zQxzcHorVXQF?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)

### Solution: New Team Leads

  - [Jen and Sydney are the new Team Leads, filling a support gap between EMs and MEs.](https://fathom.video/share/CYfYSpExYZpVCd44gg8_zQxzcHorVXQF?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
  - [**Primary Role:** Troubleshoot high-TTD accounts to build ME leverage.](https://fathom.video/share/CYfYSpExYZpVCd44gg8_zQxzcHorVXQF?tab=summary&timestamp=839.0)
  - [**Focus:** Fix pipeline architecture to prevent recurring issues, not edit every piece of content.](https://fathom.video/share/CYfYSpExYZpVCd44gg8_zQxzcHorVXQF?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**Sydney's Sprint Team Task:** Ensure pipelines are performant and calibrated before they exit Sprint, which prevents production issues downstream.](https://fathom.video/share/CYfYSpExYZpVCd44gg8_zQxzcHorVXQF?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)

### Client Perception & The Need for Flawless Quality

  - [Clients are inherently skeptical of AI-generated content, often expecting it to be bad.](https://fathom.video/share/CYfYSpExYZpVCd44gg8_zQxzcHorVXQF?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)
  - [**Impact:** Any error, even minor style choices (e.g., m-dashes), can undermine client confidence.](https://fathom.video/share/CYfYSpExYZpVCd44gg8_zQxzcHorVXQF?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)
  - [**Action:** Treat every deliverable as if it will be scrutinized. Flawless execution is the only way to build trust.](https://fathom.video/share/CYfYSpExYZpVCd44gg8_zQxzcHorVXQF?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)

### Pipeline Hygiene: The Root Cause of High TTD

  - [The top two causes of high TTD are:](https://fathom.video/share/CYfYSpExYZpVCd44gg8_zQxzcHorVXQF?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)
    1.  [**Artifact Conflicts:** Use the Convergence Report to identify and resolve.](https://fathom.video/share/CYfYSpExYZpVCd44gg8_zQxzcHorVXQF?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)
    2.  **Instructions Lacking Context:** The agent cannot execute commands based on external knowledge.
          - [**Ineffective:** "Write something funner than last time."](https://fathom.video/share/CYfYSpExYZpVCd44gg8_zQxzcHorVXQF?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
          - [**Effective:** "Write a CTA like this example, which the client approved."](https://fathom.video/share/CYfYSpExYZpVCd44gg8_zQxzcHorVXQF?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)
  - [**Pipeline-Specific Artifacts:** Use unique artifacts for different content types (e.g., comparison articles) to prevent "mumbo-jumbo" output.](https://fathom.video/share/CYfYSpExYZpVCd44gg8_zQxzcHorVXQF?tab=summary&timestamp=1892.0)

### Admin: Skills Assessment

  - [Complete the skills assessment form to inform client assignments and align work with your experience.](https://fathom.video/share/CYfYSpExYZpVCd44gg8_zQxzcHorVXQF?tab=summary&timestamp=1946.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**All MEs:**](https://fathom.video/share/CYfYSpExYZpVCd44gg8_zQxzcHorVXQF?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
      - [Proactively file tickets for accounts with high TTD (\>2x average).](https://fathom.video/share/CYfYSpExYZpVCd44gg8_zQxzcHorVXQF?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
      - [Use the Convergence Report weekly to check for artifact conflicts.](https://fathom.video/share/CYfYSpExYZpVCd44gg8_zQxzcHorVXQF?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)
      - [Ensure all pipeline instructions are contextually complete.](https://fathom.video/share/CYfYSpExYZpVCd44gg8_zQxzcHorVXQF?tab=summary&timestamp=1477.0)
      - [Complete the skills assessment form.](https://fathom.video/share/CYfYSpExYZpVCd44gg8_zQxzcHorVXQF?tab=summary&timestamp=1946.0)
  - [**Jen & Sydney:**](https://fathom.video/share/CYfYSpExYZpVCd44gg8_zQxzcHorVXQF?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
      - [Begin troubleshooting high-TTD accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/CYfYSpExYZpVCd44gg8_zQxzcHorVXQF?tab=summary&timestamp=839.0)

action_items.description: Email Sydney + Jen: focus on high-TDD clients; avoid editing every piece
Email production team: agenda + skills assessment link
